_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 2026-04-23T01:08:00Z tick — 2 events (1 news_flash opec_supply Feb13 stale archive + 1 alert_audit_request OIL retest_90 derivative). Audit: stale archive NOT thesis-altering; OIL confluence weak +34.5 3/4 bullish 286p-away, NOT armable; alert KEEP unchanged. TUNED opec_supply query: removed broad 'war'/'Iran' required-kw (matches Hormuz-tangential archives) and loose '2026'/'April' match_kw (published dates always contain current year). Kept 3 alerts KEEP, 9 structure_watch KEEP. BOJ T-4d, FOMC T-6d.

level_alerts.note: ADDED 22:33 UTC — buy WTI 90.30 retest of broken 90 resistance as new support. Live 22:32 UTC 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39). Clean break above 90 on Hormuz blockade re-rating (IRGC seized 2 ships + fired on 3rd Apr 22) — gold NOT joining the move confirms this is oil-supply specific. Anticipation logic: pullback to 90.30 with M15 reject wick + hold = buy. If price accepts below 90 (closes M15 < 89.80) thesis dead. SL 89.20 (90p risk), TP1 93.50 (daily high break, ~320p), TP2 95.00 (~470p). Conv 4: fresh structural break + clear invalidation.
